Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants an analysis of three loan application cases Case ID 1 2 and 3 based on a provided event log and a set of rules Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Conditional Logic If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case If Rejected Close Case No Finalize Documentation Constraints No skipping no reordering no contradictions Part 2 Desiderata Recommended but Not Strict Timing Credit Check 24 hours after App Received Timing Inform Applicant 48 hours after Loan Decision Optional Activity Followup Call encouraged but not required

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event Log Data Analysis Case 1 1 20240110 0900 Application Received 2 20240110 0930 Credit Check 3 20240110 1000 Risk Assessment 4 20240110 1100 Loan Decision Approved 5 20240110 1300 Inform Applicant 6 20240110 1330 Finalize Documentation 7 20240110 1400 Close Case Normative Check Sequence matches exactly Approved path followed Finalize before Close Desiderata Check Credit Check timing 30 mins after App 24h OK Inform Applicant timing 2 hours after Decision 48h OK Followup call Absent This is a desideratum failure but usually absence of an optional step isnt a violation of a strict rule just missing a recommendation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 1 20240111 0800 Application Received 2 20240111 0820 Risk Assessment 3 20240111 0900 Credit Check 4 20240111 0930 Loan Decision Rejected 5 20240111 1000 Finalize Documentation 6 20240111 1030 Close Case Normative Check Sequence Violation Risk Assessment happened before Credit Check The rule says Credit Check must be performed before any risk evaluation Conditional Logic Violation Loan Decision was Rejected However Finalize Documentation occurred before closing Rule says If the loan is rejected close without finalizing documentation and Performing Finalize Documentation after a rejection is not allowed Ordering check Even though Credit Check eventually happened the order was wrong relative to Risk Assessment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 1 20240112 0900 Application Received 2 20240114 1000 Credit Check Gap is 48 hours 3 20240114 1100 Risk Assessment 4 20240114 1200 Loan Decision Approved 5 20240116 1500 Inform Applicant Gap is 51 hours 6 20240117 0900 Finalize Documentation 7 20240117 1000 Close Case Normative Check Sequence is correct App CC RA Dec Info Fin Close Approved path logic holds Desiderata Check Credit Check Timing Jan 12 9am to Jan 14 10am 49 hours Constraint was 24h Violation Inform Applicant Timing Jan 14 12pm to Jan 16 15pm 51 hours Constraint was 48h Violation Followup call Missing Missing Recommendation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task Requirements 1 Identify normative violations with reasons 2 Identify desiderata failures noting severity 3 Suggest interpretationsjustifications Drafting the Response Structure Introduction Section for Normative Analysis Cases 1 vs 2 vs 3 Section for Desiderata Analysis Section for InterpretationsJustifications Refining Content Case 1 Perfect compliance on strict rules Missed followup desiderata Case 2 Major violations Reason A Precedence constraint violation RACC Reason B Negative constraint violation Doc finalization on rejection path Case 3 Strict rule compliant Soft rule violations Reason A Latency on Credit Check 24h Reason B Latency on Notification 48h Reason C Omission of Followup Interpretations Case 2 Why did this happen Maybe a system glitch allowed manual override Or perhaps Risk Assessment here was actually a preliminary screening mislabeled Or simply human errorrushing The log explicitly notes the violation so I should confirm it based on the prompts hints Case 3 Delays Weekend effect Jan 12 is Friday Jan 14 is Sunday Usually banks dont process then but the log shows timestamps Maybe backlog

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets doublecheck dates for Case 3 context if needed though not strictly required by the prompt it adds flavor to justifications Jan 12 2024 is indeed a Friday Jan 14 is Sunday This explains the 24h delay perfectly weekend Jan 14 Sun to Jan 16 Tue explains the notification delay MonTue processing This is a good interpretation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Stepbystep Plan 1 Normative Analysis Case 1 Compliant Case 2 Noncompliant List specific violations Order RAC C Logic RejectionDocs Case 3 Compliant 2 Desiderata Analysis Case 1 Compliant mostly but missed Followup Call Case 2 NA or irrelevant since hard rules were broken though technically timings might be fast the process is invalid anyway I will focus on Case 3 for the detailed desiderata breakdown as thats where the prompts example data points are rich Case 3 Noncompliant with soft rules Late Credit Check Late Notification No Followup 3 Interpretations Case 2 Operational error bypassing mandatory gates Case 3 Resource constraints or calendar effects weekends causing delays in soft targets Formatting Use bolding and lists for readability Ensure the distinction between Violation Strict and Deviation Soft is clear SelfCorrection during drafting Ensure I dont mark Case 1 as violating the followup call as a normative rule Its explicitly under Part 2 So Case 1 is Normatively Clean Final check of constraints Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment Case 2 fails this If rejected do not finalize documentation Case 2 fails this Credit Check within 24h Case 3 fails Inform within 48h Case 3 fails Looks solid Proceed to generate output
